mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_record ( id, visitor_id, visit_time, terminal_id, is_deal, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{entity.id}, #{entity.visitorId}, #{entity.visitTime}, #{entity.terminalId}, #{entity.isDeal}, now(), now(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visitor_id = VALUES(visitor_id), visit_time = VALUES(visit_time), terminal_id = VALUES(terminal_id), is_deal = VALUES(is_deal), update_time = now(), deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT e.employee_code as employeeId, e.name as employeeName, COUNT(v.id) as totalVisits, COUNT(CASE WHEN v.is_deal = 1 THEN v.id END) as successfulVisits, COUNT(CASE WHEN v.is_deal = 1 THEN v.id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(v.id) as successRate, COUNT(DISTINCT v.terminal_id) as uniqueTerminals, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN v.is_deal = 1 THEN v.terminal_id END) as successfulTerminals FROM employee_info e LEFT JOIN visit_record v ON e.id = v.visitor_id WHERE v.visit_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND v.deleted = 0 GROUP BY e.employee_code, e.name ORDER BY successRate DESC
